u.a: picks up another book , "good night , gorilla"
the animals in the story have followed the zookeeper into his house without his noticing .
each animal in the story voices "good night ."
INV1 is trying to get the child to describe the picture , not just read
they are messing around with toy schoolhouse .
there are googly eyes on the front of the toy bus .
runs bus to show how the eyes shift to and fro
